'''Urootar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who had served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Going into hiding on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], he had descended into madness and strayed from the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Path]].

==Biography==
[[File:UrootarCombat.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Urootar in combat]]
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Urootar had received some form of formal [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] before the initiation of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and the disbandment of the Order. With the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Urootar fled into exile on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] where he set up a small hovel along the [[Rryatt Trail]]. Living in solidarity and living a life of relative obscurity, Urootar fell into madness without the Order.<ref name="SWG" />

By [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], as the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] kept the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] busy and off the task of hunting Jedi, Urootar was considered dangerous by inhabitants of surrounding areas. Indeed, the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Krepauk]] hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who was passing through the area to kill the madman as he felt the Jedi was too dangerous to be left alive. The spacer completed the task, and Urootar became [[The Force/Legends|one with the Force]], freeing him from his madness and finding redemption.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Urootar appeared as a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
